docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,259.00 FILED BY BARANCE, MAJID AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, JUSTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
